scripts.typecheck: bash -c 'if [ -f tsconfig.json ]; then pnpm exec tsc -b; else echo "No tsconfig.json found; typecheck skipped."; fi'
scripts.lint: bash -c 'if [ -x node_modules/.bin/eslint ]; then eslint .; else bash -n hooks/*.sh; echo "ESLint not installed; shell hooks linted."; fi'
scripts.format:check: bash -c 'if [ -x node_modules/.bin/prettier ]; then prettier . --check; else echo "Prettier not installed; format check skipped."; fi'
scripts.format: bash -c 'if [ -x node_modules/.bin/prettier ]; then prettier . --write; else echo "Prettier not installed; format skipped."; fi'
scripts.test: bash -c 'if [ -x node_modules/.bin/vitest ]; then vitest run; else echo "Vitest not installed; tests skipped."; fi'
scripts.graphql:check: bash -c 'if [ -x node_modules/.bin/graphql-codegen ] && [ -f codegen.ts ]; then graphql-codegen --config codegen.ts; elif [ -f schema.graphql ] || [ -f graphql/schema.graphql ] || [ -f apps/api/schema.graphql ]; then echo "GraphQL schema found; add a configured checker." >&2; exit 1; else echo "No GraphQL schema found; graphql check skipped."; fi'
scripts.db:check: bash -c 'if [ -f prisma/schema.prisma ] && [ -x node_modules/.bin/prisma ]; then prisma validate; elif [ -d supabase/migrations ] || [ -d migrations ]; then echo "Database migrations found; add a configured db checker." >&2; exit 1; else echo "No database schema or migrations found; db check skipped."; fi'
scripts.design:import: bash -c 'if [ -f tools/figma-import/src/index.ts ]; then tsx tools/figma-import/src/index.ts examples/figma-input.button.json; else echo "Design import tool not present; skipped."; fi'
scripts.design:map: bash -c 'if [ -f tools/component-mapper/src/index.ts ]; then tsx tools/component-mapper/src/index.ts; else echo "Component mapper not present; skipped."; fi'
scripts.compliance:review: bash -c 'if [ -f tools/compliance-agent/src/index.ts ]; then tsx tools/compliance-agent/src/index.ts; else echo "Compliance review tool not present; skipped."; fi'
scripts.commit:check: bash -c 'msg=${1:-}; if [ -z "$msg" ]; then echo "Usage: pnpm commit:check .git/COMMIT_EDITMSG" >&2; exit 1; fi; bash hooks/commit-msg.sh "$msg"' --
